issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases for pricing strategy.

scenarios.name: Price a SOC 2 evidence automation SaaS based on value
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives reasonable competitor-anchored numbers but rarely quantifies annual value in dollars and applies an explicit 10-20% rule with paired risk reversals, while treatment computes hours-saved-times-rate, sets price at ~15% of value, and stacks money-back guarantee + free trial + ROI guarantee.

scenarios.name: Diagnose 4% free-trial-to-paid conversion rate
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives ad hoc onboarding/pricing fixes but rarely cites the 15-25% SaaS benchmark or systematically walks the five barriers in priority order, while treatment enumerates the exact five barriers and prioritizes value-not-demonstrated first per the skill.
